referee.submission: Challenge results create a pending work item.
referee.approval: Experienced Referee, Referee Manager or configured management role.
referee.logging: Approved/denied actions, actor and reason are retained in state and staff logs.
referee.quota: Weekly referee work can be configured; whitelist entries exempt a member until their optional expiry.

hoster.submission: Training and tryout sessions are created by structured commands, not free-form proof posts.
hoster.logging: Completed sessions write hoster work/activity records automatically.
hoster.activityCheck: Configurable interval and response deadline; default policy warns before any role action.
hoster.promotion: Quota multiplier and time-in-role recommendations are reported for Sunday review.
hoster.demotion: Automatic role removal is disabled unless autoRoleChanges is explicitly enabled.
